dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6534 IH: To repeal a restriction on assistance to Azerbaijan.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Luna introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To repeal a restriction on assistance to Azerbaijan.

section.header: Repeal of restriction on assistance in FREEDOM Support Act

paragraph.text: the Republic of Azerbaijan has remained a steadfast ally to the United States and United States allies since its independence—providing critical cooperation in times of war and times of peace;
Azerbaijan has demonstrated a clear commitment to prioritizing peace in the South Caucasus; and
Azerbaijan reached a peace agreement in which the respective borders and territorial integrity of Azerbaijan and the Republic of Armenia have been agreed upon.

subsection.header: Repeal of restriction on assistance to Azerbaijan
subsection.text: Section 907 of the FREEDOM Support Act (22 U.S.C. 5812 note) is repealed.
The table of contents for such Act is amended by striking the item relating to section 907.
